name: Cheese Biscuits-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften and blend the cheese and butter.
2. Add flour, red pepper, and Worcestershire sauce to the softened cheese mixture.
3. Knead together until well mixed.
4. Roll into a long roll, about the size of a silver dollar.
5. Freeze the dough.
6. When ready to use, let it soften for 5 minutes.
7. Slice into ¼ inch thick rounds and place on a cookie sheet.
8. Add pecans on top of each slice.
9. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
Serves: 15
Source: "Mountain Measures" by Junior League of Charleston, WV (ed. 1974)
